actions.text: Crowds decked in green, shamrocks and the Irish tricolour packed Trafalgar Square for the annual festivities, including live music, on Sunday.

actions.text: Police are appealing for witnesses after a 22-year-old man was assaulted in Glasgow.

actions.text: Orient have signed striker Macauley Bonne from Accrington Stanley.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Boco, 32, is Orient's 11th signing since they were relegated from the League Two last season.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: As well as three spells with Stanley, Boco has played for Irish side Sligo Rovers, Plymouth and India's Bharat FC.
